---
title: "Notes"
toc: false
---

Short conceptual write-ups for each tool covered in the course. Each
note is meant as a 10–15 minute read that complements the hands-on
[labs](../labs/index.qmd) and [assignments](../assignments/index.qmd).

## Planned notes

Notes will be added a few at a time as the course is built. The first
wave is in progress; this list is the roadmap.

- Week 1 — Why mathematicians need tooling
- Week 2 — LaTeX, demystified
- Week 3 — Theorem-proof typesetting and bibliographies
- Week 4 — R as a calculator, then as a language
- Week 5 — `ggplot2` in one sitting
- Week 6 — Simulation and `set.seed`: why reproducibility matters
- Week 8 — A mental model for AI assistants
- Week 9 — Catching AI hallucinations (a checklist)
- Week 12 — When you'd reach for SageMath, SymPy, or a CAS
- Week 13 — A small portfolio repo, the easy way

For software install instructions, see
[resources/software-setup.qmd](../resources/software-setup.qmd) and
[labs/lab01-install-stack.qmd](../labs/lab01-install-stack.qmd).
